deep_dive.title: AxDafny: Agentic Verified Code Generation in Dafny
deep_dive.abstract: We study agentic code generation in Dafny, where a model must generate both executable code and the proof artifacts for verification. We present AxDafny, a verifier-guided repair framework that iteratively generates implementations, invariants, assertions, and termination arguments. We also introduce LiveCodeBench-Pro-Dafny (LCB-Pro-Dafny), a benchmark of 250 competition-style programming problems translated into Dafny with formal specifications and a verifier-based evaluation harness. On LCB-Pro-Dafny, AxDafny substantially improves verification success over baseline GPT-5.5 performance. On DafnyBench, AxDafny achieves 92.7\% verification success, outperforming the strongest previously reported proof-hint baseline by 6.5 percentage points. Lastly, we show that verification success and runtime test performance measure different aspects of generated code.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: LLM agent for verified code generation in Dafny; directly demonstrates LLMs assisting formal verification
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 在Dafny中使用LLM智能体进行可验证代码生成；直接展示了LLM辅助形式验证的能力
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 在Dafny中使用LLM智能体进行可验证代码生成；直接展示了LLM辅助形式验证的能力
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 在Dafny中使用LLM智能体进行可验证代码生成；直接展示了LLM辅助形式验证的能力
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: AxDafny is a verifier-guided repair framework using an LLM agent to iteratively generate Dafny code with proofs. On LCB-Pro-Dafny and DafnyBench, it significantly improves verification success over baselines, achieving 92.7% on DafnyBench. This demonstrates LLMs can assist formal verification, and the approach is adaptable to hardware verification.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: AxDafny是一个验证器引导的修复框架，利用LLM智能体迭代生成Dafny代码及其证明工件。在LCB-Pro-Dafny和DafnyBench基准上，它将验证成功率显著提升至92.7%，优于最强基线6.5个百分点。这表明LLM能够有效辅助形式验证，且该方法可适应硬件设计的形式验证任务。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: AxDafny是一个验证器引导的修复框架，利用LLM智能体迭代生成Dafny代码及其证明工件。在LCB-Pro-Dafny和DafnyBench基准上，它将验证成功率显著提升至92.7%，优于最强基线6.5个百分点。这表明LLM能够有效辅助形式验证，且该方法可适应硬件设计的形式验证任务。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Can LLMs assist in model checking and theorem proving for hardware design?

quick_skim.title: Kani: A Model Checker for Rust
quick_skim.abstract: Rust's ownership type system prevents memory errors in safe code, but certain desirable properties remain orthogonal to compilation: the soundness of unsafe operations (e.g., raw pointer dereferences), functional correctness, and absence of runtime panics. We present Kani, an open-source model checker for Rust that pushes bounded model checking beyond bug-finding to provide correctness guarantees for these properties. Kani compiles proof harnesses from Rust's Mid-level Intermediate Representation (MIR) into CBMC's bit-precise verification engine, automatically checking a comprehensive set of safety properties with no user annotation. To extend verification from bounded to unbounded, Kani provides a specification language comprising function contracts, loop contracts, quantifiers, and function stubbing. We demonstrate feasibility through case studies on industrial Rust projects, where contracts upgraded verification from panic-freedom to functional correctness, uncovering six previously unknown bugs. Kani operates at scale in production CI, with over 16,000 harnesses verified per code change in the Rust standard library verification campaign.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Model checker for Rust using CBMC; symbolic execution and bounded model checking are directly transferable to hardware verification
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于CBMC的Rust模型检查器；符号执行和有界模型检查可直接迁移至硬件验证
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于CBMC的Rust模型检查器；符号执行和有界模型检查可直接迁移至硬件验证
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于CBMC的Rust模型检查器；符号执行和有界模型检查可直接迁移至硬件验证
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Kani is an open-source model checker for Rust that pushes bounded model checking beyond bug-finding to correctness guarantees. It compiles Rust MIR to CBMC, automatically checking safety properties with no user annotation. The tool provides specification language for unbounded verification. Its techniques are directly applicable to hardware verification as CBMC is used there.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: Kani是一个开源的Rust模型检查器，它将有界模型检查从bug发现扩展到正确性保证。它从Rust中间表示（MIR）编译到CBMC的位精确验证引擎，自动检查安全属性无需用户注释。它还提供了函数契约、循环契约等规范语言支持无界验证。该工具使用的符号执行和有界模型检查技术可直接适应于硬件设计验证。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: Kani是一个开源的Rust模型检查器，它将有界模型检查从bug发现扩展到正确性保证。它从Rust中间表示（MIR）编译到CBMC的位精确验证引擎，自动检查安全属性无需用户注释。它还提供了函数契约、循环契约等规范语言支持无界验证。该工具使用的符号执行和有界模型检查技术可直接适应于硬件设计验证。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: How are software verification techniques like symbolic execution and fuzzing adapted to hardware design verification?
